SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made and entered into on the 1st day of January 2024 by and between:

Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC: S1234567A, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 123456, and contactable at +65 9123 4567 or email tanwm@example.sg;

and

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 456 Jurong East Street 21, Singapore 654321, and contactable at +65 9786 5432 or email siti.aa@sample.sg;

WHEREAS, Dr. Tan Wei Ming agrees to sell, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah agrees to purchase, 100,000 shares of XYZ Pte. Ltd., UEN: T12LL3456X, for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 (the "Purchase Price").

It is understood that the SPA does not include any project plan or project status reports, and such elements are expressly excluded from this agreement.

Both parties agree that all communications regarding this SPA shall be directed to the aforementioned contact details. For verification purposes, please refer to https://example.sg/user/S2345678B for NRIC authentication.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this SPA as of the date first above written.
